attributes.action: Dump net zero now and secure our energy supply.
attributes.additional_details: Britain is exposed to massive energy shocks and facing a bleak future if the government persists in putting the meaningless Net Zero Policy before the nation's prosperity and energy security.
attributes.background: Dump net zero now and ramp up the extraction of oil in the North Sea, start fracking onshore and give immediate clearance for the construction of small nuclear reactors in order to secure our energy supply.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Repeal Net Zero targets & Climate Change Act. Stop Renewable energy expansion
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756685

Make the most of our own natural resources. Allow companies to drill gas and oil
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/763065
